title: juniperus formosana subsp. mairei
intro: Juniperus formosana subsp. mairei, also known as Taiwan juniper, is a subspecies of evergreen tree native to Taiwan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Juniperus formosana subsp. mairei is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and berries in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
